metadata.name: Configure New CDN for Regional Expansion

description: A streaming service is expanding to a new region (e.g., Southeast Asia) and needs to configure a new CDN provider for that region.

nodes.task_description: Set up a new profile with the chosen CDN provider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new account and configuration profile with the CDN.

nodes.task_description: Configure the CDN to pull content from the primary storage location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets the origin server address.

nodes.task_description: Update the main traffic management rules to direct users from Southeast Asia to the new CDN.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the new routing rule.
